---
name: debug-helper
version: 1.0.0
description: |
  Systematic debugging tool. Investigates root causes using four phases: investigate,
  analyze, hypothesize, implement. Iron law: no fixes without root cause.
  Use when asked to "debug this", "why is this broken", or "root cause analysis".
  Proactively suggest when the user reports an error or unexpected behavior.
allowed-tools:
  - Bash
  - Read
  - Write
  - Edit
---

# debug-helper

Root-cause investigation and debugging.
